name: Vendo Public APIs
description:
This is documentation for Vendo Public API.
#### How to implement this on your side:
1. Include in your environment configuration or another safe place following data fields:
   1. Base URL (e.g https://<domain>.com) 
   2. Base Public Path (e.g /v2) 
   3. Public API Key (8 characters) 
   4. Private API Key (32 characters)
2. Build API URL - https://<domain>.com/v2/<route> 
3. Authorization
   1. Basic Authorization Header 
      1. JavaScript > Authorization: "Basic" + new Buffer(publicKey + ":" + privateKey).toString("base64") 
      2. PHP > Authorization: "Basic" . base64_encode($publicKey . ":" . $privateKey) 
      3. C# > Authorization: "Basic" + Convert.ToBase64String(ASCIIEncoding.ASCII.GetBytes(publicKey + ":" + privateKey)) 
      4. Postman > Authorization: Username = Public Key and Password = Private Key
   2. Bearer Authorization Header (e.g Bearer IUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6Ik...)
      1. Authorization: "Bearer {{access token}}"
